message:
fix(resilience): fix race condition in test hook functions

Add hooksMu sync.RWMutex to protect concurrent access to overridable
hook functions (sendKeysFn, buildPaneCmdFn, sleepFn, checkSessionFn,
displayMessageFn).

The race occurred when:
- Test goroutine writes to displayMessageFn
- handleRateLimit spawns a goroutine that calls displayTmuxMessage
- displayTmuxMessage reads displayMessageFn concurrently

Changes:
- Add hooksMu mutex to protect hook function variables
- Update displayTmuxMessage to snapshot function under read lock
- Update saveHooks() to use mutex when saving/restoring hooks
- Add setHooksLocked() helper for safe hook assignment in tests
- Update all tests that modify displayMessageFn to use setHooksLocked
- Add mutex protection for displayCalled flag in async test

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
